blockers: deploy/kind/cluster.yaml.tpl is not in owned paths but needs a new extraPortMappings entry for nodePort 30880 -> hostPort 8880 so the KIND cluster exposes the new-ui-eval at its default smoke URL (http://192.168.122.103:8880). Without this, operators must use kubectl port-forward.

image-build/new-ui-eval/Dockerfile expects new-ui-evaluation/adapter/ and new-ui-evaluation/frontend/dist/ which are created by Group A (frontend scaffold + adapter). build-images.sh skips the new-ui-eval build gracefully if new-ui-evaluation/ does not exist yet.
summary: Group B complete. Separate K8s Deployment (port 8080, nodePort 30880) and Service for scion-ops-new-ui-eval added to control-plane manifests and kustomization. Dockerfile placeholder in image-build/new-ui-eval/ and build-images.sh wiring (--skip-new-ui-eval, --only new-ui-eval) added with graceful skip when Group A directory is absent. Smoke test extended with ensure_new_ui_eval() checking /api/overview and check_preview_coexistence() asserting distinct ports from existing web-app. Two dependency blockers noted: cluster.yaml.tpl port mapping (out of scope, needs separate update) and Group A frontend/adapter scaffold.
tests_run: python3 syntax check on kind-control-plane-smoke.py: passed
